label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: BARGUIL Romain attacked from 18-rider breakaway on final climb, dropped rivals with 6.2km to go after VINE crashed but remarkably finished third.
tactical_patterns: 18-rider breakaway quality forced GC teams to react; DSM's numbers allowed BARGUIL tactical freedom to attack chapela late.
LOPEZ Miguel Angel tested ROGLIC on final climb but ROGLIC's counter-sprint suggests he's deliberately saving energy while marking.
VINE Jay recovered from crash to finish third, revealing breakaway riders given excessive leeway by peloton on steep gradients.

rider_signals.BARGUIL Romain: positive: DSM transfer vindicated with first GT win outside France, positioned ahead of feared rival Champoussin before final climb
rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: crashed mid-stage but recovered to podium, shows resilience beyond typical breakaway specialist
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: neutral: attacked ROGLIC but gap immediately closed, suggesting probing rather than genuine form advantage
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: shut down LOPEZ then counter-sprinted hard, implying confidence to burn matches defending rather than conserving
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: negative: lost 2 seconds to MARTIN in sprint, gap now only 54s suggests red jersey under genuine threat
rider_signals.VAN MOER Brent: negative: crashed with NAVARRO taking his front wheel in corner while in winning position from breakaway
rider_signals.CHAMPOUSSIN Clément: negative: BARGUIL identified him as most feared rival but couldn't follow on final climb despite DSM pacing
